channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Bitcoin mining stocks jump as AI infrastructure boom boosts sector outlook
item.description: Wall Street’s semiconductor-driven surge is fueling fresh momentum for crypto miners betting their power-heavy infrastructure can support the AI boom.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: UK authorities sanction HTX crypto exchange over support for Russia
item.description: Formerly Huobi Global, the exchange is the latest entity to be named as part of a crackdown on companies “exploited by Russia to circumvent UK sanctions.”
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: TeraWulf acquires Kentucky AI data center site with planned 1 GW capacity
item.description: WULF shares surged on Tuesday after the Bitcoin miner announced its latest move to expand into AI and HPC through a multi-phase buildout through 2030.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Spanish authorities block Polymarket and Kalshi over gambling laws
item.description: Spain joined a growing list of national authorities restricting or banning prediction market platforms amid concerns over unlicensed gambling activities.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Bitcoin 'liquidation hunts' control BTC at $77K amid new Iran peace deal doubts
item.description: Bitcoin failed to copy US stocks' upside after a spike to $78,000 became one of a series of liquidity grabs.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: NEAR token price has 'potential to grow 20x,' says Arthur Hayes
item.description: NEAR is mirroring a 2023–2024 fractal that preceded a 250% rally, hinting at similar upside in 2026 as privacy coin demand grows.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: AI guardrail removals raise questions over limits of open-source model regulation
item.description: Financial Times testing found safety controls on open AI models from Meta and Google could be stripped in minutes, raising governance concerns.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Strategy buys back $1.5B of debt at discount, cuts outstanding notes to $6.7B
item.description: Strategy reduced aggregate convertible notes outstanding to $6.7 billion after repurchasing 2029 notes for $1.38 billion in cash.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Grvt adds 3 tokenized yield funds tied to institutional-grade RWAs
item.description: Grvt will work with Plume to launch tokenized fixed-income and structured credit products tied to institutional-grade real world assets and onchain yield strategies.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: RWA market hits $51B as tokenized private credits surges: Bernstein
item.description: Bernstein Research data shows the RWA market at $51 billion, with tokenized private credit leading and Figure leading RWA platforms with $18 billion in tokenized assets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Bitcoin’s big cup-and-handle pattern targets ‘minimum’ $220K BTC price
item.description: Bitcoin cup-and-handle chart breakout targets $220,000, but BTC price must first hold the $74,000 support area.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Ethereum treasury firms lean on staking as ETF pressure builds: Report
item.description: Everstake said staking made up 60% of disclosed revenue among six Ethereum treasury firms, while loss-making companies posted $1.41 billion in losses.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Bitcoin treasury firms add 603 BTC as Strategy pauses buying
item.description: Smaller Bitcoin treasury companies bought about $46 million worth of Bitcoin below $80,000 last week as the largest corporate holder paused its weekly buys.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Binance eyes Philippines return through SEC sandbox partnership
item.description: Binance remains blocked in the Philippines after a 2024 NTC directive tied to SEC concerns over licensing and registration.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Ex-Hodlnaut CEO charged with fraud over Terra exposure claims
item.description: Singapore police charge ex-Hodlnaut CEO Zhu Juntao with six counts of fraud by false representation over allegedly misleading statements on the company’s exposure to the Terra/UST crash.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Crypto funds bleed $1.47B as risk-off sentiment deepens
item.description: Crypto ETPs logged $1.47 billion of outflows last week as Bitcoin funds led losses, while nine altcoin ETPs still attracted inflows of more than $1 million.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Ethereum price chart targets $1.8K as total value locked hits 13-month lows
item.description: Ether price eyes a 14% drop to $1,800 as it trades in a classic bearish pattern amid declining total value locked on the Ethereum network.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Luffa secures strategic investment from GoFintech Quantum at US$220 million valuation, pioneering AI + fintech frontier
item.description: Luffa AI, a leading innovator at the intersection of Web3 and Artificial Intelligence, today announced a strategic equity investment from Hong Kong-listed GoFintech Quantum Innovation Limited (“GoFintech Quantum”, Stock Code: 00290.HK).
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Hyperliquid launches prediction markets for real-world events
item.description: Hyperliquid launched canonical prediction markets for offchain events, expanding beyond perps as analysts frame it as an onchain superapp.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: AI agents must be treated as untrusted systems: Researchers
item.description: AI agents are becoming increasingly popular among crypto users, with Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire predicting that billions of AI agents will be operating within five years.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Strive adds 1,109 Bitcoin as digital credit products gain traction
item.description: The company increased its holdings to 16,500 BTC as Bitcoin-linked preferred securities such as SATA and Strategy’s STRC gain traction in emerging “digital credit” markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Liquid launches ChatGPT and Claude trading app with live market execution
item.description: Co-Invest lets users fund accounts, analyze positions and execute trades across more than 500 markets without leaving AI chat interfaces.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Scammers make $400K through fake Uniswap ads on Google
item.description: A blockchain analyst has warned that malicious phishing advertisements impersonating Uniswap have appeared on Google Search, which has netted attackers at least $400,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Bitmine’s Tom Lee hints at stock tailwinds after firm considered for Russell 3000
item.description: Bitmine's Tom Lee says the firm could be considered for the Russell 1000, and its stock may get a boost from active and passive fund managers.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Bitcoin in ‘high-risk zone’ as ETF outflows signal institutional exit: Swissblock
item.description: This steady drip of ETF outflow continues to add to the supply side without a visible demand offset, said Glassnode.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Ondo Finance founder Nathan Allman dies aged 32
item.description: Ondo Finance says its founder, Nathan Allman, died unexpectedly, with company president Ian De Bode to serve as CEO.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Kelp DAO says rsETH restored 5 weeks after $293M protocol hack
item.description: Kelp DAO says that sETH mints, redemptions and rewards operations have been running smoothly since it opened withdrawals for the token earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Bitcoin volatility falls to 8-month low: Is a BTC breakout imminent?
item.description: Bitcoin’s 8-month low volatility can’t predict BTC’s price prediction but derivatives data does suggest that a rally to $82,000 would cause a large short squeeze.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Bitcoin holds $77K as stocks rally, global tensions cool: Are BTC bulls back?
item.description: Data suggests that Bitcoin may be gearing up for a rally to $82,000. Will bulls seize the opportunity?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman
